name: Screwball Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, sift together flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda.
3. Create three holes in the dry mixture: one for oil, one for vinegar, and one for boiling water.
4. Pour the oil into the center of the dry ingredients and create a small well.
5. Add vinegar to the oil well.
6. Carefully pour boiling water into the vinegar well.
7. Mix gently until combined.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
11. For the frosting, melt chocolate in a heat-safe bowl over simmering water, stirring occasionally until smooth.
12. Remove from heat and stir in milk, salt, and vanilla extract. Let mixture cool slightly.
13. Once cake is cooled, spread the fudge frosting evenly over the top.
14. Refrigerate for 15 minutes to set before serving.
